from datetime import datetime

from sqlalchemy import DateTime, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, func
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from app.db.base_class import Base


class Project(Base):
    __tablename__ = "projects"

    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, server_default=func.now(), onupdate=func.now())

    entries: Mapped[list["ProjectEntry"]] = relationship("ProjectEntry", back_populates="project", cascade="all, delete-orphan")


class ProjectEntry(Base):
    __tablename__ = "project_entries"

    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    project_id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, ForeignKey("projects.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    text_content: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    audio_url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(1024), nullable=True)
    audio_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(512), nullable=True)
    audio_filename: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())

    project: Mapped["Project"] = relationship("Project", back_populates="entries")

from sqlalchemy import func, select
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, selectinload

from app.models.project import Project, ProjectEntry
from app.schemas.project import ProjectCreate, ProjectUpdate


def get_all_projects(db: Session) -> list[dict]:
    stmt = (
        select(Project, func.count(ProjectEntry.id).label("entry_count"))
        .outerjoin(ProjectEntry, ProjectEntry.project_id == Project.id)
        .group_by(Project.id)
        .order_by(Project.created_at.desc())
    )
    rows = db.execute(stmt).all()
    result = []
    for project, count in rows:
        data = {
            "id": project.id,
            "name": project.name,
            "description": project.description,
            "created_at": project.created_at,
            "updated_at": project.updated_at,
            "entry_count": count,
        }
        result.append(data)
    return result


def get_project_by_id(db: Session, project_id: int) -> Project | None:
    stmt = (
        select(Project)
        .options(selectinload(Project.entries))
        .where(Project.id == project_id)
    )
    return db.execute(stmt).scalar_one_or_none()


def create_project(db: Session, data: ProjectCreate) -> Project:
    project = Project(name=data.name, description=data.description)
    db.add(project)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(project)
    return project


def update_project(db: Session, project_id: int, data: ProjectUpdate) -> Project | None:
    project = db.get(Project, project_id)
    if not project:
        return None
    if data.name is not None:
        project.name = data.name
    if data.description is not None:
        project.description = data.description
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(project)
    return project


def delete_project(db: Session, project_id: int) -> bool:
    project = db.get(Project, project_id)
    if not project:
        return False
    db.delete(project)
    db.commit()
    return True


def create_entry(
    db: Session,
    project_id: int,
    text_content: str,
    audio_url: str | None,
    audio_key: str | None,
    audio_filename: str | None,
) -> ProjectEntry | None:
    project = db.get(Project, project_id)
    if not project:
        return None
    entry = ProjectEntry(
        project_id=project_id,
        text_content=text_content,
        audio_url=audio_url,
        audio_key=audio_key,
        audio_filename=audio_filename,
    )
    db.add(entry)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(entry)
    return entry


def delete_entry(db: Session, entry_id: int) -> bool:
    entry = db.get(ProjectEntry, entry_id)
    if not entry:
        return False
    db.delete(entry)
    db.commit()
    return True

Ứng dụng đã hoàn chỉnh và đang chạy. Đây là tóm tắt:

---

## AudioScript — Quản lý dự án với Text + Audio

### Servers đang chạy
| | URL |
|---|---|
| **Frontend** | http://localhost:8386 |
| **Backend API** | http://localhost:2701 |
| **API Docs** | http://localhost:2701/docs |

---

### Tính năng

**Quản lý dự án:**
- Tạo / sửa / xóa project tùy ý
- Sidebar hiển thị danh sách và số lượng entry

**Mỗi project có thể:**
- Thêm nhiều nội dung: **văn bản** + **file audio** (tùy chọn)
- Kéo thả hoặc click để upload audio (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A)
- Audio được lưu lên **S3**, phát trực tiếp trong trình duyệt
- Xóa từng entry riêng lẻ

**Giao diện:**
- Dark editorial theme — Playfair Display + Lora + DM Mono
- Responsive, toast notifications, loading/empty states

---

### Cấu trúc DB
```
projects          → id, name, description, created_at, updated_at
project_entries   → id, project_id, text_content, audio_url, audio_filename, created_at
```

### API chính
```
GET    /api/projects
POST   /api/projects
GET    /api/projects/{id}
PUT    /api/projects/{id}
DELETE /api/projects/{id}
POST   /api/projects/{id}/entries   (multipart: text_content + audio_file)
DELETE /api/projects/{id}/entries/{entry_id}
```
